---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance tasks, refactoring, or technical debt
title: 'Maintenance: '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Maintenance Task Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task needed.

## Task Type
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Technical debt reduction
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Current State
Describe the current state of the code/system that needs maintenance.

## Desired State
Describe what the code/system should look like after maintenance.

## Impact
Describe the impact of not performing this maintenance:
- [ ] Low - Nice to have, no immediate impact
- [ ] Medium - Should be addressed soon
- [ ] High - Needs attention, impacts development
- [ ] Critical - Blocking or causing issues

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] Small (< 2 hours)
- [ ] Medium (2-8 hours)
- [ ] Large (> 8 hours)

## Related Issues/PRs
Link to any related issues, pull requests, or discussions.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, code snippets, or examples about the maintenance task here.
